name: E-5 inline suppression: a comma-separated rule-list suppresses each named rule
command: printf 'eval("x"); // rubric-disable-line no-eval, no-alert -- batch\n' > in.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/inline-suppression.sh" --rule no-eval --in in.js 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/inline-suppression.sh" --rule no-alert --in in.js 2>err2.txt; rc2=$?; [ "$rc2" -eq 0 ] && echo both_suppressed 1>&2
